case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. BAUMAN LANSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND IT'S SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUMAN LANSCAPE AND CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND IT'S SUCCESSORS $5,555.00 PRINCIPAL, $555.50 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,335.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
